info.title: Metasploit Pro REST API
info.description: Metasploit Pro REST API provides programmatic access to penetration testing workflows. Manage workspaces, hosts, services, vulnerabilities, sessions, modules, credentials, social engineering campaigns, and reports. Available on Metasploit Pro deployments.

parameters.name: module_type
parameters.description: Module type (exploit, auxiliary, post, payload, encoder, nop)

tokenAuth.name: token
tokenAuth.description: Metasploit Pro API token. Can also be passed as query parameter.
